query:
SELECT DISTINCT de.indication, COUNT(de.id) as medication_count
FROM drug_entries de
WHERE de.indication IS NOT NULL 
  AND de.indication != ''
  AND (de.icd_codes_raw IS NULL 
    OR de.icd_codes_raw = '' 
    OR de.icd_codes_raw = '[]'
    OR JSON_LENGTH(de.icd_codes_raw) = 0)
GROUP BY de.indication
ORDER BY de.indication
LIMIT 100
